kept_spans: We all know and love those minimal raver jeans, and they finally dropped the undistressed pair.

My cuticles are genuinely fucked, so when buttoning the jeans, I literally got blood on the crotch, which is awesome. But, honestly, other than that, these jeans are so fire.

And, honestly, even with the blood on the crotch, I still might wear these today. Fuck it.
If you're seeing this video, the sale on them is still happening, but they are selling out fast and colorways are almost gone.
